hooks.command: cd "/Users/hieutc/Claude Playground/Web Portfolio" && status=$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$status" ] && exit 0; code=$(echo "$status" | grep -E "\.(tsx?|jsx?|json|css)$" | wc -l | tr -d ' '); docs=$(echo "$status" | grep -E "(CLAUDE\.md|README\.md|\.claude/)" | wc -l | tr -d ' '); [ "$code" -gt 0 ] && [ "$docs" -eq 0 ] && echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"Reminder: $code source file(s) modified — check if CLAUDE.md, .claude/ rules, or README.md need updating.\"}" || true
